failure_conditions.description: Planner finished but required output files are missing
failure_conditions.detection: Check file existence: product-spec.md, features.json (产品型) or task.md (all types)
failure_conditions.escalation: If still missing after max_retries → escalate_to_user

failure_conditions.description: Planner exceeded time limit without completing
Planner returned without writing any files (detected by empty-task-response-detector hook)
Executor failed the same round multiple times in a row
failure_conditions.escalation: If still failing after fresh round → mark_blocked_continue_next

failure_conditions.description: Smoke test failed at session start — codebase is in broken state
Executor modified features.json fields beyond passes (detected by write-existing-file-guard hook)
Executor shows premature completion signals while features remain incomplete
failure_conditions.escalation: Generate handoff.md and spawn fresh agent

failure_conditions.description: Executor returned without making code changes or writing evidence
Same feature rejected 3+ times — checker/executor may be in a loop
failure_conditions.context: Include last 3 rejection reasons in escalation message

failure_conditions.description: Checker approving work that should fail (detected by calibration loop)
failure_conditions.detection: Scores consistently > 8.5 OR approved work breaks in next round

failure_conditions.description: Checker issued acceptance without running any verification tools
failure_conditions.detection: acceptance-report.md has no 'Direct verification' section or all entries say 'indirect proof'
failure_conditions.escalation: Add rule to quality-guardrails.md: checker MUST run verification tools

steps: Find last commit before current round
If smoke passes: continue from that state
If smoke fails: escalate to user
Generate handoff.md with precise next step
Checker re-evaluates last 3 acceptances against examples

auto_pilot_interruptions.escalation_message_template: Auto-pilot interrupted: {reason}. {blocked_count} features blocked, {completed_count}/{total_count} completed. Last error: {last_error}. Please advise.
